feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Dispatcher does not start after Refresh database
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are currently carrying out System Refresh from  Production System to Test system using hana backup and recovery method.

We are currently able to restore & recover the Production backup on Test System. We have tried to restart the database & application .But we are unable to start the SAP application and disp+work is gray.

dev_w0 shows the below logs:

Sat Jul 20 12:39:55:886 2024
*** ERROR => Connect to database failed, rc=1, rcSQL=-10709
[dbhdbsql.cpp 620]
 SQLCODE : -10709
 SQLERRTEXT : Connection failed (RTE:[89009] Socket connect timeout (60000 ms) (192.168.212.250:21026 -> sappcopy:\
 30515))
 ***LOG R19=> ThDbConnect, db_connect () [thxxtool.c 6114]
 ThIErrHandle: in_ThErrHandle: 1
 *** ERROR => ThInit: db_connect (step TH_INIT, thRc ERROR-DB-CONNECT_ERROR, action STOP_WP, level 1) [thxxhead.c 2851]

 Info for wp 0

pid = 459367
 severity = 0
 status = 0
 stat = WP_NEW
 waiting_for = NO_WAITING
 workerType = DP_WORKER_DIAWP
 act_cs_count = 0
 csTrack = 0
 csTrackRwExcl = 0
 csTrackRwShrd = 0
 mode_cleaned_counter = 0
 control_flag = 0x1200000
 report = > <
 action = 0
 tab_name = > <

 ThIErrHandle: no current incoming request

 Entering TH_CALLHOOKS
 ThCallHooks: call hooks for event BEFORE_DUMP
 ThIErrHandle: entering PfStatReset
 ThIErrHandle: Entering DpRecoverMtxAfterProcessCrash
 DpRecoverMtxAfterProcessCrash: recover mutex after crash of W0
 ThIErrHandle: DpRecoverMtxAfterProcessCrash o.k.
 ThIErrHandle: do not call ThrCoreInfo (no_core_info=0, in_dynp_env=0)

 ***
 *** work process W0 died => ThInit: db_connect
 call ThrShutDown (1)...
 SigISetIgnoreAction : SIG_IGN for signal SIGUSR1
 SigISetIgnoreAction : SIG_IGN for signal SIGUSR2
EnqWorkProcess: Initializing enqueue client
 ***LOG Q02=> wp_halt2, halt wp () [dpuxtool.c 335]

 

Can you please help us on how to resolve this error?

I must add that after system rename(Changes the SAP system ID), the problem is solved and the application server starts. But we want to solve the problem without changing the system sid.

Your help in this regard will be highly appreciated.

With regards,

Maryam

SAP S/4HANA 

SAP HANA

entry.title: Export custom report as csv file
entry.content:
I would like to export custom report as csv file in s4hana system.

Currently, there is only 2 options to export "excel" and "pdf" in custom report.

Is there any other ways to export as csv file?

Best Regards,

KhaingZin

entry.title: Setting Up Your Statutory Reporting activity in SAP Central Business Configuration
entry.content:
I can't find Setting Up Your Statutory Reporting activity in SAP Central Business Configuration.

Please help me how to go to this activity.

Best Regards,

KhaingZin

entry.title: SAP LM01 PROCESS TO FIORI APPLICATION
entry.content:
Initially we were using LM01 tcode in SAP ITS technology in TAB but now we shifted to fiori technology and we have created tile of lm01 in fiori application, it is transaction based fiori applications are shown up in TAB but the screens are not user friendly so do we need to create free style fiori application using sapui5 .

Please help in resolving this issue.

entry.title: Query on PageSize Property in S/4 HANA Public edition -- Business Partner Odata API
entry.content:
Dear All,

Good Day to Everyone

Is there a PageSize property available in S/4 HANA Public edition -- Business Partner Odata API ? Setting this property should return all the specified records from the system.

Regards

Rahul Jain

entry.title: Method to manage a portfolio of suppliers for a certain category.
entry.content:
Hello

What method have SAP users found to manage a portfolio of suppliers for a certain category, and then to control a preference for those suppliers when conducting an RFQ ? 

For instance.    Say you have five suppliers who can supply widgets.    One is preferred, two are for development.  one still needs to be qualified, and one should not be sourced due to an issue with them. 

I need visability of the five widget suppliers, and their status.    All should get RFQ, but I should only source the preferred or development supplier.  I wonder how other SAP users have approached this from a system standpoint.

Our implementation of SAP will be S/4HANA.

Any suggestions welcome..

Thank you

entry.title: How to create a Background Job for creating Production Plans in S&OP Based on Target Stock Level
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently working on a project where I need to create a background job for creating production plans in SOP for many materials based on the target stock level. 

In the SOP screen_ MC87_ I can create a production plan based on the target stock level for only one material as shown below. (We are not using the Products group).  

 

The Target stock level is entered manually for each material, now I want to create a background job to do the same for many materials. We are using standard SOP.

Could anyone provide detailed steps, and if possible, screenshots to guide me through this process?

Thank you in advance for your help!

entry.title: Process Chains - Start an S/4 job only after successful completion of IBP Application Job Template
entry.content:
Hi,

The context here is to try and schedule an S4 job only upon successful completion of an IBP job. Is this possible within the "Processes" of IBP itself?

Alternatively, is this possible from the standard S/4 HANA CLOUD or BW/4HANA Process Chains (RSPC)? Perhaps utilize CI-DS? Or is an external scheduling tool such as Redwood always needed?

Kind regards,
V.

entry.title: Organizational Change: Mass Change Profit Center Assignment
entry.content:
Hi All,

We currently have a customer who periodically conducts a profit center reorganization. At the moment, the Manage Organizational Changes app can be used for this purpose. However, we need to manually update the new profit centers for cost centers each time, as described here: 

"The current scope also includes the reassignment of profit centers in cost centers. However, you don’t need to maintain the new profit center to cost center assignment in the Manage Organizational Changes app. Instead, you use the Manage Cost Centers app or the Change Cost Center transaction (KS02) to create a new validity period for a cost center with the new profit center assignment. If the Activate Organizational Change option is selected in the Activate Organizational Change Features Customizing activity, and if a suitable organizational change exists, the new profit center assignment is automatically considered in the organizational change." (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/8fbeed5f2046489696a50ac7fd76f9c6/ed0e1bde97874abea698a105c5109894.html)

Is there a way to perform a mass update of cost centers or a job? Currently, many manual steps are required, making the entire process very error-prone. Is there a best practice for this?

 

Thanks for your help!

entry.title: BOM not getting completely exploded in Planned Order/ Production Order
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am currently facing a problem, where it seems the BOM is not getting fully exploded when creating planned orders with MRP. The planned order only shows me 2 components of 5. Only after I click explode BOM, the other 3 materials appear in the component tab.

The BOM used is for a conifurable product. When creating planned order for another variant of this product, all components appear correctly initally in the planned order.

Can someone guide me in the direction of where I need to check?

 

Thanks

entry.title: SAP ERP-EWM-DM integration issues.
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

We tried to integrate SAP embedded EWM with SAP DM. The connection for master data works between SAP S/4 HANA & DM works fine( At least we think it's fine) because we can able to see the order download in SAP integration message dashboard.

1#. 

But after download, everything shows as failed, for example messages such as "Production Order PRT Download", "Order Status Sync (RMES)", "EWM Staging Request" shows as failed status. 

2#.

3#.

4#.

5#. 

 

 

We already checked the complete integration regarding  this page " Connecting to EWM in SAP S/4HANA 2021 | SAP Help Portal" but we could not able to resolve the issue.

6#.

As per SAP standard process as soon as Production order is released and WM Staging is executed, the order should appear in "Manage Staging 2.0 app" in SAP DM. But it's not the case.

Along with that we see PPF actions warning in /SCWM/PMR

7#

 

If some one could able to help in this issue would be great.

entry.title: MM Issue on FM MEPO_DOC_HEADER_PROCESS
entry.content:
In sap Q41, We are trying to create a Purchase Order but it goes in error on the commodity group. We need to figure out why.
We saved the 3 variants in the FM MEPO_DOC_HEADER_PROCESS that are extracted when the idoc is launched.

TESTKO_MR
TESTKO_MR1
TESTKO_MR3

entry.title: Planning of activity types in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi All, 

 

The blog from 2015 on SAP indirect activity determination and allocation outlines older methods for managing cost rates (https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/activity-based-costing-in-sap/ba-p/13265081). I'm looking for updated, automated solutions, especially since Universal Parallel Accounting is not active, which prevents the use of the "Manage Cost Rates-Plan" app. Any insights on more current approaches would be appreciated. How can I plan the Cost Rates in an automated way?
 
Thanks for your help!

entry.title: Old deleted demand (PIRs) is copied again while running MC8G
entry.content:
Hello,

Issue is that we want to delete the old demand by one month (PIRs) by executing MD74, PIRs are getting deleted from MD04 and MD63, but latter when programs RMCP6BIN and RMCP6RES (MC8G) to transfer demand from MC94 to PIRs, all the old demand that has been deleted already by MD74 is also being transferred and PIRs reappearing.

We want to delete old PIRs but also need to transfer demand, how can we make to not transfer the old demand that has been deleted already.

This are the steps we are doing:

Review old PIRs in MD04.

Execute MD74 to delete old PIRs by one month ahead.

Review old PIRs deleted in MD04.

Execute programs RMCP6BIN and RMCP6RES (MC8G) to transfer demand to PIRs.

Review old PIRs deleted in MD04 are reappearing.

 

Please let me know your comments.

Thank you, regards.

entry.title: How much time does an S4 upgrade generally take?
entry.content: Let us say I am moving from S4 Hana 1909 to S4 Hana 2023. How much time will the Standard, Downtime Optimized process and nZDT take respectively? It depends on Database size  and hardware resources but let us say I have a DB of around 3 TB and optimum hardware resources available.

entry.title: Assign reporting category in Setting Up Your Statutory Reporting
entry.content:
When I assign reporting category in Setting Up Your Statutory Reporting activity, this error occurs and can't assign.

I did not assign Country/Region when create report category and assign Country/Region in below screen. Because if i assign when create report category, this category does not appear to choose in below screen.

Kindly help me to solve this issue. Thank You.

Best Regards,

KhaingZin

entry.title: I am unable to print PO form.
entry.content:
We are using ME23N t-code to print PO form but unable to print po form it is asking for password when we try to click on print option. we can be able to save the po form but when we open saved pdf it is asking for password. We tried in ME9F also we got same issue. I can see the printing is not allowed in file permissions. How to provide access to print PO form.

Is there any option to enable printing permission from Basis or ABAP side?

entry.title: What replaces deprecated Scope Item 19C?
entry.content: Greetings, we are interested to learn what functionality now replaces scope item 19C which is no longer available in 2402. Can SAP please recommend the Best Practice alternative approach we should adopt to achieve similar functionality?

entry.title: Automatic supplier Validity date based on the supplier audit management on S/4 Hana
entry.content:
Hello there!
How can S/4 Hana automate the validation of supplier validity dates based on supplier audit evaluation score?

I am looking for a descriptive solution with configurations. Thanks in Advance!

entry.title: Pending quantities for services purchase order (without MIGO entering)
entry.content:
Hi All!

I am trying to understand why SAP (S/4 HANA 1909) is calculating pending quantities to services Purchase Orders (PO) in ME21N...

We use the DIEN material type to services here.

The field 

Is there any configuration to make on the system to avoid this calc?
